privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract queue semantics only; raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads are excluded.

records.title: Effective queue state is a projection, not a single mutable file
records.summary: The canonical queue snapshot can lag later append-only queue projections. Current status must therefore be derived without rewriting the historical source records.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Compare the canonical queue blob with later queue-update commits and reject this record if no later projection changes an item's effective state.

records.title: A deterministic reducer now preserves field-level queue provenance and refuses equal-time conflicts
records.summary: M-004 converted the queue-precedence decision into executable reducer logic with deterministic ordering, field-level provenance, explicit conflict recording, and unsafe-selection refusal.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Fetch the reducer and test commits, inspect the conflict path, and run the committed tests in a clean checkout.

records.title: Reducer implementation is committed but clean-runtime execution evidence is absent
records.summary: The source and deterministic test contract are committed, but no retained clean-checkout test result establishes that the reducer executed successfully in repository context.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Resolve only with retained output from node --test tools/continuity/effective-queue.test.mjs and node tools/continuity/effective-queue.mjs against the same source commit.
